account-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to a newer patch release.
Update the Java version property to target JDK 21.
account-service/pom.xml.why_exists: The project is migrating to Java 21; without this change, the build would target Java 17, potentially missing new language features or failing strict JDK 21 compliance checks.

account-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Cloud version to a newer release compatible with the updated Spring Boot version.
